title: nervilia campestris
intro: Nervilia campestris, also known as the field nervilia or yellow field orchid, is a species of orchid native to tropical Africa. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Nervilia campestris include treating fever, headache, and respiratory infections, as well as being used as an antiseptic and anti-inflammatory agent. In herbal preparations, Nervilia campestris is often used in the form of a decoction or infusion, and is also used in traditional African medicine to treat various health conditions.
